description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular body with a prominent upper receiver and a pair of parallel cylindrical barrels extending from the front. The main housing is blocky and industrial, with deep grooves and ridges along the top, suggesting reinforced construction. The lower section includes a complex trigger assembly and magazine well, with visible slots and mechanical details. The rear of the rifle is squared off, lacking a traditional stock, and the grip area is integrated into the main chassis. The overall finish is matte and utilitarian, with a dark, metallic appearance. The design is modern and functional, likely intended for urban tactical use.
description: A modern, blocky rifle with dual barrels, a matte dark finish, and an integrated grip. The design is robust and industrial, lacking a traditional stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular body, dual barrels, and detailed lower assembly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin barrels and symmetrical upper housing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the angular body and mechanical lower section.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the squared-off back, internal trigger assembly, and lack of a traditional stock.
